programme.title: Decisive Battles of Hitler's War
programme.desc: When Hitler claimed restitution of Sudetenland, France, and Britain abandoned their ally. Ignoring offers to help defend the Czechs, French leaders met with Hitler in Munich in Sep. 1938.

programme.title: Decisive Battles of Hitler's War
programme.desc: In an initial failed attempt to become a partner the equal of Germany in the Axis Alliance, Mussolini ordered his troops towards the British positions in Egypt in September 1940.

programme.title: Decisive Battles of Hitler's War
programme.desc: To Adolf Hitler in 1940, Britain was no more than an irritant on his periphery to his rapidly expanding Third Reich.

programme.title: Secrets of War
programme.desc: Uncover the best-kept secrets of the air campaign in the Gulf War. Learn more about the controversial yet strategic plans to destroy Iraqi targets.

programme.title: Secrets of War
programme.desc: Secrets from the electronic battlefield. From the 'Battle of the Beams', to the evolution of weapons guidance and the effects of electronic jamming.

programme.title: Secrets of War
programme.desc: A look at two of the Kremlin's numerous top spy operatives whose endeavors brought them to Tokyo and Paris. Their allegiance to Stalin never waned.

programme.title: Secrets of War

programme.sub-title: The Gulf War: Architects of Desert Storm

programme.title: Battlezone WWII: The Big Battles

programme.title: Greatest Tank Battles
programme.desc: On June 6, 1944, the Allies land on the northern coast of France. This is the story of the 2nd Canadian Armoured Brigade as they fight their way inland against a stubborn and ruthless German defense.

programme.title: Greatest Tank Battles
programme.desc: After the success of the Blitzkrieg, young men across Germany flock to the armored corps in search of glory and excitement. This is the story of one young German tanker as he comes face to face with the harsh realities of armored warfare.

programme.title: Battleplan
programme.desc: Winning a swift victory by catching the enemy unawares, is one of any commanders’ great dreams. Sometimes, it can be a dramatic reaction to an opportunity, or it can be designed to remove a potential threat from the enemy’s arsenal.

programme.title: Battleplan
programme.desc: Flank attack – going around the side of the enemy instead of taking him head-on – is one of the most basic of Battleplans, yet stories of key victories decided by a flanking manoeuvres fill military textbooks.

programme.title: Weapons Race
programme.desc: Discover the most powerful manned jet in the world; The Lockheed F-22 Raptor. Its extraordinary capability is the result of a weapons race to evolve the perfect combat aircraft which began well before Frank Whittle invented the jet engine.

programme.title: Weapons Race
programme.desc: The most fearsome tank on today’s battlefield is the US M-1A2 Abrams, virtually impregnable, fast, and capable of destroying an opponent many miles away. It is the most perfect example of a weapons race which began over 90 years ago.

programme.title: Piranha

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo get to the bottom of fake news with VIDEO OR DIDN'T HAPPEN, describe the joy that is a CROWDGASM, and see what happens when you take too much melatonin and go MELATONIC.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo, and Chanel celebrate the holiday season by fighting through BLACK AND BLUE FRIDAY, GETTIN' UGLY with Christmas sweaters, and spinning some HUMAN DREIDELS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness dedicated to the greatest form of precipitation, Rob, Steelo and Chanel pay a visit to the CUL-DE-SLOPES, watch some ICE CARPADES, and find evidence of the elusive SNOW SCORPIONS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Mark Cuban joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo to discuss future investments in the MARK TANK, try to solve the CUBAN BATHROOM CRISIS and explore the DANGERS OF DUNKING.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness it's Ladies Night! Rob, Steelo, and Chanel celebrate incredible women with SUPER SHE-ROES, pay homage to mothers in MOMMIN' AIN'T EASY, and explore the fabled women's restroom in LEGENDS OF THE STALL.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Grammy nominated singer-songwriter and actress Christina Milian joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to be amazed by some SUPERHUMANS, give some restaurants an F-RATING, and be terrorized by some FEATHER SHARKS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness, dedicated to the smart people who make our world a better place, Rob, Steelo and Chanel take a look at some lesser-known NERDACHIEVEMENTS, the dark side of science, with TRIAL AND TERROR

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On a special episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling and Chanel get down with the bros as they view the world in BRO-MOTION, learn what it means to be BRO-PROOF, and study the special bro bond IN BRO WE TRUST.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo and Chanel get dodge ball damaged in RUBBER STAMPED, become masters of disguise with BLENDERS, and get too honest dropping TRUTH BOMBS

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness singer/songwriter/producer Mike Posner joins Rob, Steelo and Chanel to take TOO MANY PILLS, explore some BROMANTIC BONDS and learn about WHITE GIRL PROBLEMS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Laker shooting guard Jordan Clarkson joins Rob, Steelo and Chanel to throw down some JAMMIES, check out the TONGUE CAM and experience some water pain in the category GETTIN' LAKED.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Waka Flocka Flame joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to consider hiring some QUALIFIED ROLLERS, marvel at people who use NO HANDS, and laugh at CRAPTICAL JOKERS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Waka Flocka Flame joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to consider hiring some QUALIFIED ROLLERS, marvel at people who use NO HANDS, and laugh at CRAPTICAL JOKERS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness dedicated to the world of weed, Rob, Steelo and Chanel check out some ANIMALS IN PANTS, explore what it's like to have BONG BRAIN and ask themselves the question AM I HIGH?

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness the 80's are back with Rockdiculousness! Steel Panther joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to fire up the FLAME FUEL, grab some COMMUNITY PROPERTY and tempt death with LIVIN' ON A PRAYER.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness, we celebrate the world of NASCAR, with a salute to PASS MASTERS, an introduction to NASCAR EXITS, and a look at what happens when people get PAVEMENTAL.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo, and Chanel are joined by country musician Wheeler Walker, Jr. to discuss his BANNED MATES, analyze grooming techniques in MUFF MAINTENANCE, and explore the embarrassment of PREMATURE RELEASES.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness Rob, Steelo and Chanel are joined by actor Matt Shively to experience some PARANORM-ISH ACTIVITY, do some ATTEMPTED MAN SHIT and meet some animals that are MILK READY.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Laugh along with Rob, Steelo, and Chanel as they break down hilarious Redneck Good Times, Nutflix, and Double Whammies. Guest Ryan O'Malley, a professional pogo sticker, shows the highs and lows of being Pogo Stuck.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Movie Star Johnny Knoxville helps Rob break down Makeshift Ramps, Freak Beasts, and Poorly Placed Kids. Learn why you're Never too Old to Slam and why birds are not your friend.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob's former co-star Big Black joins the panel, breaking down Makeshift Thrill Rides, Bieber Hair, and Coming in Hot. See how human scorpions sting in a whole different way than the spider that attacks an innocent dad.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Action sports star Travis Pastrana helps Rob illustrate some Poorly Placed Trees and Whiskey Throttles. Rob breaks down Pastranabees and Animals Being Human. Explode with laughter at an ill-fated Butt Bottle Rocket.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Action sports personality The Dingo joins Rob in breaking down Pain Angels, Worst Case Scenarios and things That'll Cost You. And you'll never guess what happens when a heavy lifter loses control.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo, and Chanel laugh till it hurts at Unnecessary Combos, people who should Stay out of the water, and others who just plain wonder Who Put That There? Karate expert Matthew Mounce helps break down some Bad Karate.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Producer Jeff Tremaine joins Rob in breaking down what it means to Lawnchair and Slam and Sprint. Some kids start slamming young in Ridiculousness in Training, and Rob points out Your Friend's a Dick.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Beauty Queen Caite Upton joins Steelo on the panel. Rob breaks down the magic of Man-kinis and Dodging Bullets. Guest Matt Schlager demonstrates how to fall with your face first and hands second, in Getting Schlagered.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob's cousin Drama helps Rob break down Family Dysfunction, Your Friend's a Dick, and Little Rollers. Credit Cards compete for pain against Popsicles. And learn whether Parkour is an art or just some Aggressive Running.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Bull rider Judd Leffew schools Chanel on whether bulls get dizzy when Rob breaks down A Bunch of Bull and Angry Animals. Watch fools compete in the Ridiculousness Decathlon. And a whole lot of people get Dunked.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Caite Upton joins Steelo once again as Rob shows off S**t Whips and Redneck Good Times. A lot of people blow out their money-makers in De-Faced. Biker Fox joins the panel for some fun in spandex and scrapes in Biker Down.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: TV star Ryan Dunn joins the fun as Rob points out the problems with Lower Education. See some folks who are clearly Out of Your League while others get slammed in That's What You Get and Let Me Help You Hurt Yourself.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob breaks down Why Rollerblading Should Make a Comeback. Witness a merry-go-round of pain in Worst Case Scenario, Almost Made It and Not Even Close. And guest unicyclist Dan Heaton shows off some Uni-Psychos.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Learn How Not to Treadmill and why Grass is Your Friend. See a wake of damage after Trees Strike Back. Guest dancer Cole Hernandez brings some Weird Dancing. Some skaters get Racked. Rob narrates Chicken Police.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: The Dingo is back! Laugh as a whole lot of people have a Tough Day on the Job, find out if You're Too Old For That, and who's Almost Awesome. Rob breaks down Skiers vs. Snowboarders. Shoes go flying off in Shoe Down.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Big Black is back and he's showing off Black Lavender. See what happens When Bad Ideas Go Worse and people suffer a Failure to Launch. Rob's got a special category that only comes once: You Couldn't Do That Again if you Tried.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Justin Bieber stops by the set to show off some of his Canadian pride, learn about Humanimals and what Popcorning is really all about.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Floyd Mayweather visits the Ridiculousness studio where Rob shows him what a Pain Face looks like. They'll also endure some Romantic Injuries and learn How Not To Train.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Former "PMOY", Sara Jean Underwood, visits the Ridiculousness set where Rob shows off his Fear Face and they talk about how Cats are Weird.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: UFC fighter & former champion, Quinton "Rampage" Jackson, shows his wolf battle cry and what really sets off his Hot Button. Rob also shows videos of Crappy Endings and what it's like to get Slampaged.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Ace of Cakes star chef, Duff Goldman, stops by set with a scorpion cake and we see some of his Unnecessary Costumes. He and Rob also show videos of Grand Entrances and Ghost Holes.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Australian-born actor and radio personality, Jason Ellis, shows us he is an expert at Showing Off Gone Wrong when the introduction of Tramp Stamp videos earns him a surprise payback from Chanel.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Girls Like That
programme.desc: Vinny velger mellom to grupper jenter. Siden Angelina er borte vil Snooki at hun og Jenni skal skvære opp med Sam. Gleden blir kortvarig for Snooki, når Mike blir stadig mer fiendtlig.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Deja Vu All Over Again
programme.desc: Alle er frustrerte over Mike - han får gjengen sparket ut av en klubben, får bilen tauet vekk, brenner nesten ned huset og svikter Pauly. To ganger.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Back into the Fold
programme.desc: Pauly og Vin har sine siste dater med Miami-jentene, mens Sam og Ron raskt havner i krangel. Jenni lager bråk mellom Pauly og Mike, og det blir en siste kveld full av drama i boblebadet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Back to the Shore
programme.desc: Gjengen er tilbake for enda en vill sommer på Jersey-kysten! Angelina er borte, og Snooki har med seg vennen Deena. Spenningen mellom jentene etter Miami eksploderer den første kvelden.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: It's Gonna Be an Interesting Summer
programme.desc: Konflikten mellom Sammi og JWoww skaper spenning i huset. Ronnie og Sammi isolerer seg og går glipp av første familiemiddag. Men når Ronnie bestemmer seg for å henge med resten av gjengen, føler Sammi seg helt alene.
programme.sub-title: It's Gonna Be an Interesting Summer

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Where's the Beach
programme.desc: Sammi vil slutte fred med Snooki og Deena. JWoww møter eksen Roger. Snooki blir arrestert for drikking på offentlig sted.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Free Snooki
programme.desc: Snooki er deprimert etter å ha blitt arrestert, helt til hun treffer en ny gutt. Deena treffer Ronnies stuntmann. JWoww og Tom slår opp.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Drunk Punch Love
programme.desc: Ronnie og JWoww slutter fred, og Sammi slår til Ronnie. Vinny møter en jente med overlegen familie. Og Mike avslører Deenas lille hemmelighet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Should We Just Break Up?
programme.desc: Ronnies drikking gir smertefulle bivirkninger. Snooki treffer en gutt som kanskje eller kanskje ikke er forlovet. Pauly slutter fred med en gammel fiende.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Cabs Are Here!
programme.desc: Ronnie og Sammis stormfulle forhold er over. Ronnie ødelegger alt Sammi eier, og hun må bestemme seg for om hun skal forlate gjengen.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Great Depression
programme.desc: Ronnie sliter etter at Sammi dro, og føler at han ikke har noen venner i huset. Jentene tar Sammis parti, guttene vet ikke hvordan de skal muntre ham opp. Mike legger an på Paulys ekskjæreste.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Kissing Cousins
programme.desc: Snookis sexfylte sommer hjemsøker henne. Mike drar den ultimate spøk mot Deena og Snooki, men de andre ler sist når Mike somler med å komme til middag.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: A Cheesy Situation
programme.desc: Sammis retur gjør Ronnie målløs. Snookis følelser for Vinny blir dypere. Mike møter en jente han mener lukter ost, men vet ikke at han blir kraftig lurt.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: GTF - Gym, Tan, Find Out Who Sammi Is Texting
programme.desc: Vinny og Pauly drar til Staten Island. Roger blir mer enn en rebound for JWoww. Mike avslører Sammi, og får Ronnie til å tvile på kjærligheten til henne.
programme.sub-title: GTF - Gym, Tan, Find Out Who Sammi Is Texting

programme.title: Jersey Shore: A House Divided
programme.desc: Mike skaper stadig bråk mellom Ronnie og Sammi. Snooki krangler med Vinny. Og Deena blir sint på Pauly og Vin fordi de legger an på hennes beste venn.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: At The End of the Day
programme.desc: Mens ett par står ved et veiskille i forholdet, gjør et annet det offisielt. Gjengen tar farvel etter enda en sommer på Jersey Shore.
programme.sub-title: At The End of the Day

programme.title: Jersey Shore: From the First Fist Pump
programme.desc: Et underholdende tilbakeblikk på de første tre sesongene av Jersey Shore - med all moroa, dramatikken, skurkestrekene og avkjølende øyeblikk som folk ikke kan slutte å snakke om.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Going to Italia
programme.desc: Deltakerne pakker extensions og Shore Store-T-skjorter og drar på europeisk eventyr i Italia. Men kultursjokket som venter er ingenting sammenliknet med de sjokkerende, nye romansene.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Like More than a Friend
programme.desc: Deena og Pauly vurderer konsekvensene av sex, mens Mike prøver å ta forholdet til Snooki ett skritt videre. På klubben prøver Ron og Sammi å bli venner, men gamle vaner, gode og dårlige, er vonde å vende.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Twinning
programme.desc: Tvillinger gir dobbelt så mye trøbbel når 'bi-nysgjerrige' Deena raner Mike og Vinny. Mikes hemmelige 'forhold' til Snooki blir avslørt. Er Snooki utro eller vil The Situation bare lage bråk?

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Crime and Punishment
programme.desc: Guttene plager Deena fordi hun stjal en jente fra Vinnys seng - og hun begynner å tvile på forholdet til de andre. Ronnie & Sam er tilbake i gamle vaner, men nå er Mike innblandet i deres problemer.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: And the Wall Won
programme.desc: Mike har lagt trøbbel for Ron og Sam i årevis. Det ender i slåsskamp, og Mike bæres ut på båre. Har ting gått for langt? Og er forholdet mellom Sam og Ron nå fullstendig ødelagt?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog tries to convince a fugitive's on-again, off-again girlfriend that it's in everyone's best interest to send the man to jail.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A phone call from an informant sends the team on a race against time to apprehend an elusive car thief.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog, Beth and the team face many surprises while in Colorado; while the children attend camp, the crew hunts a man who disposed of a homicide victim.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his posse track a first-time offender whose life is at a crossroads.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog searches for the perfect gift for Cecily's 16th birthday and hunts a fugitive with a connection to his estranged son Tucker.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog encounters fighting roosters, hostile squatters and more odd characters while on the hunt for an elusive and clever criminal that takes Dog through the parts of Hawaii that tourists never see.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog helps Leland get to the truth in a very confusing case.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back in Colorado chasing a man who has fled to Texas so Dog tries a risky strategy.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has issues with the shirt that Beth purchased for him; the gang goes after a fugitive who failed to appear in court.

programme.desc: Jason Plato is joined by ex-Formula One driver Karun Chandhok to battle it out on the track in two of the most sort-after super sports cars; Porsche 911 GT3 RS vs Nissan GT-R Nismo.

programme.title: Fifth Gear

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In this episode of Fifth Gear Tiff Needell visits northern Sweden for a very chilly rally challenge. He has just a few hours to learn the skills of racing on sheet ice before he takes on a rally champion over a treacherous rally stage.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford takes puts the Grande Punto Abarth through its hot hatch paces. Tim Shaw finds out if it's possible to save huge amounts of money by servicing your car yourself. Bruno Senna joins the programme as a special guest presenter.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Multi-millionaire John Caudwell, the boss of a mobile phone company, has a budget of £500,000 to spend on new cars and he's come to Fifth Gear for some advice on what motors to choose.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell reports on fifth Gear's project to build a 200mph car. Last time we saw our Lotus it blew up in a cloud of smoke, but it's back, repaired, and even more modified.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff pits Renault's latest hot hatch the stripped out and hardcore Megane R26.R, against a Caterham CDX. Jonny brings us his verdict on the brand new Ford Ka. Tim delves into the world of car crime, to make us more aware of what criminals look for.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell reports on fifth Gear's project to build a 200mph car. Last time we saw our Lotus it blew up in a cloud of smoke, but it's back, repaired, and even more modified.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In this edition of we're literally taking Fifth Gear to new heights and celebrating the most spectacular challenge petrol-heads have ever invented.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: We reveal the Best Cheap Car in Britain, meet the man who's giving away a free Ferrari to try and help sell his house, and a look round the country's ultimate supercar collection.

programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson tries to crack 150mph as she makes an attempt on the Blindfolded Land Speed World Record. Can Vicki hold her nerve and set a new record for driving in a straight line?

programme.desc: Vicki finds out which is quickest - an old Vauxhall against a new one. Jonny Smith and Tom Ford contest one of motor sport's oldest and most gruelling events, the Exeter Trial. Tiff Needell goes to France to drive the new Audi A3 Cabriolet.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason Plato pitches a lunatic Honda Civic Mugen RR imported from Japan against a Honda S2000 sports car from the UK. Jonny Smith tests the VW Passat CC v Mercedes CLS. Tiff Needell takes to the track to test the brand new KTM X-Bow.

programme.desc: Tiff heads to Anglesey for not one but two Shoot-Outs, the Porsche Cayenne goes head to head with the BMW X5 and the Renault Clio takes on the Honda Civic.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom tests the chic rival to the MINI the Fiat 500; we find out if fuel additives really work by testing four leading brands; Jonny and Tom build and test an armoured Rolls-Royce with live ammunition and Tiff drives the Ferrari 430 Scuderia.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Quentin Willson enlists the help of a car psychologist to cure one sufferer who finds it impossible to drive without swearing profusely at other drivers.

programme.title: Secretos de la Ciudad
programme.desc: Una nueva residente de Redlands desaparece. La comunidad, consternada, se une para encontrarla, pero el caso se convierte en una investigación de asesinato, demostrando que su pequeña y tranquila ciudad tiene un lado oscuro.

programme.title: Acusado: ¿Yo lo hice?
programme.sub-title: ¿Asesino a sangre fría o tirador aterrorizado?
programme.desc: Una tranquila mañana de domingo termina en tragedia cuando un accidente automovilístico acaba en un altercado mortal. Un hombre de 25 años es acusado de homicidio en segundo grado tras matar a tiros a un conductor adolescente.

programme.title: Acusado: ¿Yo lo hice?
programme.sub-title: ¿Asesino de un solo golpe o hermano protector?
programme.desc: Un asalto termina en tragedia cuando unos adolescentes disparan bolas con pistolas a dos hermanos que juegan un partido de baloncesto, lo que provoca una pelea entre los jóvenes, dejando a un chico de 17 años muerto en el lugar.

programme.title: Acusado: ¿Yo lo hice?
programme.desc: Historias de personas que enfrentan cargos por delitos graves como asesinato en primer grado, homicidio involuntario, terrorismo doméstico y agresión con agravantes.

programme.title: Acusado: ¿Yo lo hice?
programme.sub-title: ¿Es un asesino con cuchillo o un defensor inocente?
programme.desc: El vicepresidente de un centro médico enfrenta 95 años de prisión por apuñalar mortalmente al marido de una doctora. Él insiste en que se vio obligado a defenderse, la fiscalía argumenta que él es el agresor y debe ser declarado culpable.

programme.title: Acusado: ¿Yo lo hice?
programme.desc: Un policía fuera de servicio dispara a un hombre en el pecho tras una discusión. La defensa cree que es un caso claro de defensa propia. Un testigo ocular cambia su declaración y la fiscalía lo acusa de asesinato.

programme.title: ¿Quién da má$?
programme.desc: Los compradores buscan hallazgos ocultos en Norwalk, California. Mary llega muy preparada para la batalla. Ivy vuelca su atención hacia objetos de colección. Darrell idea un plan para escapar.

programme.title: ¿Quién da má$?
programme.desc: Una visita a Torrance, California, deja pocas unidades de calidad. Jarrod compra un casillero y Brandi debe enfrentar sus miedos. Ivy intenta un nuevo enfoque. Rene crea negocio para otros.

programme.title: ¿Quién da má$?
programme.desc: Rene hace una oferta para cerrar el trato de un gran almacén en Beaumont, California. Mary espera que las unidades de gama baja se conviertan en un gran golpe. Para Jarrod es difícil delegar.

programme.title: ¿Quién da má$?
programme.desc: Los compradores buscan el tesoro en el sur de la frontera con San Diego; René y Casey defienden su propio terreno contra Darrell y Brandon; Mary fija los ojos en una unidad familiar de alta gama ; Ivy trae dos Calvins adicionales para las festividades.

programme.desc: The adventures of Alice, a creative five-year-old girl who makes the little ones travel through her illustrated diary and conversations with her mother.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Funhouse
programme.sub-title: Is There a Plumber in the House?; A Fish Tale
programme.desc: When Funny needs a plumber, he tries to distract the gang with errands to avoid a visit from the funhouse doctor; Funny takes everyone to Big Fish Swamp to go fishing.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: Four curious young dinosaur friends explore the mystery of Gigantosaurus, the largest, fiercest dinosaur of all, facing their individual fears and working together to solve problems during their many adventures.

programme.title: Firebuds
programme.desc: Bo and his fire engine best friend, Flash, team up with their first responder friends to help others in their community with problems.

programme.title: Dino Ranch
programme.desc: When Jon gets spooked by a campfire story, he doesn't want to admit it; when he finally comes clean, he learns that his family is there for him whether he's scared or not.

programme.title: Marvel's Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: Spidey teams up with Ghost-Spider and Miles Morales to make up the Spidey Team, with some assistance from Spidey's comical but loyal Spider-bot, Trace.

programme.title: Pupstruction
programme.sub-title: Fast and Furriest; Luna Digs Deep
programme.desc: When a hamster ball rolls out of control, the "Pupstruction" crew tries to stop it; Luna loves playing with her new excavator scoop so much that she stops getting any work done.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: After their powers are stolen and given to the Woflies, the PJ Masks team up with them to vanquish Romeo; Night Ninja hypnotizes all of the school kids with his special ninja dance.

programme.title: Kiya and the Kimoja Heroes
programme.desc: A 7-year-old African girl who loves ballet and martial arts and her two best friends put on their magical crystal headbands to become superheroes and defend their community.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: When Rusty's game clashes with Bluey's game at playgroup, the gang realizes that the games actually have a lot in common.

programme.title: Disney Jr. Ariel - The Little Mermaid
programme.sub-title: The Great Big Garden Show; The Sea Sniffles
programme.desc: Ariel wants her plant to grow; Flounder plays sick.

programme.title: Kindergarten: The Musical
programme.sub-title: Shoeloose; If I Only Had a Scarf
programme.desc: Berti doesn't want to get her new sparkly sneakers dirty, so she refuses to play at recess; Berti loses her scarf at school and then spots it on a second-grader.

programme.title: SuperKitties
programme.sub-title: A disfrutar; El zoom de Zsa-Zsa
programme.desc: When Ginny gets a boo-boo, Sparks, Buddy and Bitsy have to learn to work as a team without her; the SuperKitties help Peanut get Nadia's stolen toy car back from Zsa-Zsa.

programme.title: Marvel's Iron Man and His Awesome Friends
programme.desc: The Iron Friends must save the pier, then stop Ultron from turning Stark Expo into Ultron Expo; Absorbing Man steals the power of bouncy boots.

programme.title: Star Wars: Young Jedi Adventures
programme.sub-title: Off the Rails; The Thieves of Tharnaka
programme.desc: Kai and the Jedi must stop Taborrs train heist; the Jedi set out to recover a mysterious artifact.

programme.title: SuperKitties
programme.desc: Ginny, Sparks, Buddy and Bitsy are not only cute and cuddly kittens, but are also brave, smart, strong and kind and turn into Super-Kitties when trouble arises.

programme.title: SuperKitties
programme.sub-title: Voice With No Choice; Brother Battle
programme.desc: The SuperKitties stop Zsa-Zsa from turning animals' voices into musical instruments; Sparks and Buddy accidentally hurt each other's feelings.

programme.title: SuperKitties
programme.desc: After Sparks falls off his SuperKitty Kit, the SuperKitties help him get the courage to ride it again; Bitsy eats too many treats and can't help the team stop Lab Rat.

programme.title: Casas históricas
programme.sub-title: El capítulo del agujero de bala
programme.desc: Mike, Jen y Rich trabajan en una casa de la década de 1830 que tiene detalles históricos y algunos fantasmas. Mike llama a un cazador de fantasmas para comunicarse con los antiguos inquilinos.

programme.title: Joe, el inspector de propiedades
programme.desc: Una pareja busca un suburbio más familiar para criar a sus dos hijas. Con opciones limitadas en el barrio de sus sueños, Joe y Noel se enfrentan a la remodelación de un gran espacio para crear la casa segura y de estilo granjero de sus sueños.

programme.title: Restauración vintage
programme.desc: Jessie y Tina enfrentan la renovación de un bungalow de 1912 estilo Craftsman en San Dimas, Calif., una comunidad con estilo de pueblo pequeño y arquitectura única.

programme.title: Remodelación sorpresa: puertas adentro
programme.desc: Un comedor aburrido se transforma en el estilo europeo.

programme.title: Nuestro hogar frente al lago: renovación
programme.sub-title: Regreso a casa en el lago Blue Ridge
programme.desc: Cuando una expatriada regresa a su ciudad natal de Georgia para encontrar un refugio junto al lago para ella y sus tres hijos pequeños, un viejo amigo se une a ella para ayudarla a encontrar la propiedad adecuada.

programme.title: La búsqueda del diseñador estrella
programme.desc: La transformación de cocinas y comedores en casas vecinas para satisfacer a los clientes.

programme.title: La primera reforma
programme.desc: Raisa y Austin realizan dos renovaciones. Mark y Michael quieren espacios divertidos y relajantes que reflejen su familia diversa. Bethany y Dave necesitan espacio de almacenamiento y funcionalidad a las necesidades de una familia en crecimiento.

programme.title: Hogares increíbles
programme.desc: Una fábrica mexicana se convierte en una casa de lujo; una casa de árbol sin paredes en Australia; una casa en Irlanda está escondida detrás de una pantalla de metal; departamento en Moscú; roca en sala de California; casa sin ventanas en Japón.

programme.title: Menos es más
programme.desc: Extravagantes, divertidas, numerosas y consumistas familias brasileñas serán desafiadas a cambiar sus estilos de vidas y enfrentar el mundo desde una perspectiva diferente.

programme.title: Remodelación sorpresa: puertas adentro
programme.desc: El agua es la inspiración para la renovación de un elegante salón.

programme.title: Los cazahogares en la playa
programme.desc: Una familia compuesta por siete miembros, que vive en una vivienda pequeña en una región sin acceso al mar, busca una casa en la playa de Navarre (Florida). Él quiere un muelle y estar cerca del trabajo, ella prefiere privacidad y amplitud.

programme.title: Hogares increíbles
programme.desc: Residencia de cuento de hadas en Suiza; casa flotante en Londres; casa de exhibición; principios del yoga; imagen perfecta de casa en Canadá; casa en la costa inspirada en Bélgica; una casa con una mente propia; fósiles; casa sucia.

programme.title: Nuestro hogar en la montaña
programme.sub-title: Búsqueda del hogar perfecto en la cascada
programme.desc: Una mujer y su hijo quieren adquirir una casa en las montañas del valle del río Columbia. Su prioridad es disfrutar de unas vistas hermosas y no estar alejados de Portland, Oregón, la ciudad donde la señora tiene a casi todos sus clientes.

programme.title: Casas extravagantes
programme.desc: Jack hace tres paradas más en su búsqueda de las casas únicas. Una casa recién comprada que se inspira en un instrumento musical, un complejo con cúpula de tierra en el desierto y una casa digna de un rey.

programme.title: Nuestro hogar frente al lago: renovación
programme.sub-title: Cerca del mar en puerto Orchard
programme.desc: Una pareja de Washington busca en los lagos de la región un refugio frente al mar cerca del océano Pacífico en Port Orchard. Esperan renovar una acogedora cabaña y convertirla en una escapada de ensueño para su joven familia.

programme.title: Nuestro hogar en la montaña
programme.desc: Una pareja quiere marcharse del tráfico de Atlanta e ir a vivir a las montañas Blue Ridge en Georgia. Él desea una casa con un cuarto donde pasar el tiempo libre, pero ella quiere una vivienda con acceso al lago y vistas al paisaje de las montañas.

programme.title: Negocios en juego
programme.desc: Jordan Farmar busca un contrato de arrendamiento a corto plazo en Nueva Jersey para la temporada; Vontae Davis quiere vender su casa recientemente renovada.

programme.title: ¿Por qué compré esta casa?
programme.desc: Una joven pareja tiene suelos de amianto y una peligrosa instalación eléctrica en su jardín, por lo que Kim debe reconstruirlo para que la familia pueda tener un lugar seguro donde prosperar.

programme.title: Mansiones en los árboles
programme.desc: Pete construye una casa inspirada en mariposas en un grupo de seis árboles en Ohio. Está dotada de una red para trepar a la misma y un ático. ¿Les gustará a los residentes de un centro terapéutico?

programme.title: Hogares increíbles
programme.desc: Casa de campo de bosque con una capa de invisibilidad; casa con temática de huevo en Indonesia; diminuta casa California; casa de bambú; azotea ondulada; búnquer frente a la playa; primitiva criatura de mar; minigolf flotante.

programme.title: Negocios en juego
programme.desc: Cato June quiere ayudar para encontrarle a su familia un departamento lujoso en la ciudad de Nueva York.

programme.title: Restauración vintage
programme.desc: Una pareja asume un gran riesgo cuando compra una vivienda de estilo español en LaVerne (California) sin haberla visto previamente.

programme.title: Remodelación sorpresa: puertas adentro
programme.sub-title: Cuarto principal de un experto en almacenamiento
programme.desc: Una pareja quiere un dormitorio principal sólo para adultos con gran capacidad de almacenamiento.

programme.title: Como en tu casa
programme.desc: Una pareja renta un cuarto adjunto a su casa, pero ahora necesitan de Ryan y Claire para transformar toda la propiedad en una casa lujosa.

programme.title: Remodelación sorpresa: puertas adentro
programme.desc: Un cuarto de estar/comedor se unifica con un diseño inspirado en una playa y los viajes.

programme.title: Nuestro hogar frente al mar
programme.desc: Una pareja quiere alejarse de la ciudad en Austin, Texas, y encontrar una casa de vacaciones en la playa; después de pasar veranos en la costa de Surfside Beach, Texas, no pueden pensar en un lugar mejor para llamarlo su hogar lejos del hogar.

programme.title: Nuestro hogar frente al lago: renovación
programme.sub-title: Trabajando juntos en el lago Cedar Creek
programme.desc: Una familia de Dallas quiere escapar del calor veraniego de la ciudad transformando una casa en el lago Cedar Creek Lake en el refugio perfecto frente al mar, con algunos toques personales para que las mascotas se sientan como en casa.

programme.title: Casas históricas
programme.desc: Mike, Jen y Rich deben decidir si van a trabajar en una casa de 1735 en Cape Cod con una chimenea descentrada y una historia tormentosa o una casa colonial de 1830 que se rumorea que fue la posada Old John Carver.

programme.title: Hogares extraños
programme.sub-title: De una lavandería a un molino
programme.desc: Una pareja transforma una granja lechera en una casa de ensueño. Una fábrica de ruedas de carreta pasa de regalo de bodas a dulce hogar. Una pareja se muda a una planta de energía.

programme.title: Restauración vintage
programme.desc: Jessie y Tina enfrentan la renovación de un bungalow de 1912 estilo Craftsman en San Dimas, Calif., una comunidad con estilo de pueblo pequeño y arquitectura única.

programme.title: Nuestro hogar en la montaña
programme.desc: Una pareja está preparada para escapar del ruido y caos de Charlotte, Carolina del Norte, y rodearse de las vistas de la cordillera Azul en una casa de vacaciones; buscan un lugar cerca de Hendersonville con espacio para la familia.

programme.title: Casas desastrosas
programme.sub-title: Una vida simple en el Norte
programme.desc: Una mujer busca mudarse cerca de su familia en Leland, Michigan, pero los precios altos han dejado todo fuera de su presupuesto. Cristy la ayuda a estar menos tiempo en el traslado y más tiempo con su familia.

programme.title: Los caza hogares
programme.sub-title: Una familia busca un lugar para establecerse en Colorado
programme.desc: Un veterano de la Fuerza Aérea está retirado con su familia en Aurora, Colorado, y quiere vivir en un campo de golf.

programme.title: Nuestro hogar en la montaña
programme.sub-title: Casa en la naturaleza en monte Rainier
programme.desc: Una pareja de Seattle quiere mudarse a Mount Rainier, en Washinton, para darle a sus hijos la misma infancia al aire libre que ellos pudieron disfrutar. Quieren estar cerca de la ciudad, una gran chimenea y espacio para recibir invitados.

programme.title: ¿Por qué compré esta casa?
programme.sub-title: De garaje lleno a lugar de fiestas
programme.desc: Los Bader se enamoran de una casa con garaje para cinco coches; sin embargo, su interior tiene grandes problemas, como una cocina minúscula, dos comedores que ocupan demasiado espacio y ningún baño para los invitados.

programme.title: Los cazahogares en la playa
programme.sub-title: Búsqueda de casa en la isla Camano
programme.desc: Una pareja busca la casa de playa perfecta en la isla Camano, en el estado de Washington. Él quiere una vivienda que sea barata de mantener y esté cerca de Seattle. Ella prefiere una buena privacidad y vistas al estrecho de Puget.

programme.title: Carpas hawaianas
programme.desc: Los recién casados Cheyenne y Austin les piden a los constructores Nathan y Jenny que construyan su primera vivienda.

programme.title: Negocios en juego
programme.desc: Jordan Farmar busca un contrato de arrendamiento a corto plazo en Nueva Jersey para la temporada; Vontae Davis quiere vender su casa recientemente renovada.

programme.title: Restauración vintage
programme.desc: Jessie y Tina enfrentan la renovación de un bungalow de 1912 estilo Craftsman en San Dimas, Calif., una comunidad con estilo de pueblo pequeño y arquitectura única.

programme.title: Echando raíces
programme.desc: La pintoresca casa de campo de una pareja tiene el tamaño perfecto, pero queda pequeña cuando se reúne la numerosa familia. Ben y Cristi transforman el granero en una extensión de su casa con una impresionante chimenea.

programme.title: Casas históricas
programme.desc: Mike, Jen y Rich intentan devolver un tinglado del siglo XIX a su gloria original. El tinglado pertenecía a uno de los hombres más ricos de su época.

programme.title: Remodelación sorpresa: puertas adentro
programme.desc: Un cuarto de estar/comedor se unifica con un diseño inspirado en una playa y los viajes.

programme.title: Los cazahogares en la playa
programme.desc: Una pareja deja su casa sin acceso al mar en Montana para encontrar un nuevo hogar en las playas de Ferndale, Washington. Ella sueña con vistas panorámicas del océano, pero él busca una casa lista para mudarse, con suficiente espacio al aire libre.

programme.title: Casas históricas
programme.sub-title: El capítulo de las armas escondidas
programme.desc: Mike, Jen y Rich se proponen transformar un granero en ruinas de 1892 en una hermosa casa. El equipo comienza la renovación descubriendo dos armas antiguas, que podrían ser evidencia para resolver un caso de asesinato sin resolver de hace 100 años.

programme.title: Joe, el inspector de propiedades
programme.desc: Una familia pensó que había encontrado la casa perfecta hasta que un problema de inspección los excedió del presupuesto. Ellos buscan la ayuda de Joe y Noel para encontrar una casa sin sorpresas.

programme.title: Bear Grylls - Wild Reckoning
programme.desc: Julie and Jason were happily married for 27 years. But Julie's experience of going through menopause nearly tore them apart. Can time in the wild help get their spark back?

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Past road trip competitors and comedy icons Jennifer Saunders, Darren Harriott and Phill Jupitus trade punchlines for profits, hunting for antique treasures. No hecklers, please!

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Nicki Chapman is in the West Country, helping three generations from the West Midlands to make a Devon escape. She also tries her hand at weaving with a local textile designer.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: Monty looks back at some of the remarkable gardeners shining a light on how people can grow their own nutritious food fresh from the garden.

programme.title: BBC News [NEW]
programme.desc: A comprehensive compilation of the latest and the most important news stories, updates and developments from the UK and different parts of the world.

programme.title: Politics Live [NEW]
programme.desc: Jo Coburn invites a panel of guests to share their opinions on the newsmaking stories of the day.

programme.title: Impossible
programme.desc: Contestants compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

programme.title: Unbeatable
programme.desc: Jason Manford hosts the quiz show where players face a question and pick from a board of six rankable answers. Some answers are good, but only one is unbeatable.

programme.title: The Boss
programme.desc: Susan Calman hosts the quiz show where being in control is everything. Who will emerge as the Boss and walk away with the cash? Only the strongest players will survive the game.

programme.title: The Vintage French Farmhouse
programme.desc: The trio head to Sommières, a centre of trade since Roman times. While Harry haggles over some oversized jewellery, Ian takes home a large plaster cherub statue.

programme.title: Villages by the Sea
programme.desc: Archaeologist Ben Robinson visits the Norfolk village of Cley next the Sea and discovers that due to Dutch settlers in the Elizabethan era, it's not as 'next the sea' as it once was. Ben finds a village green that was once a thriving port with big ships and surrounded by a thriving village. He visits the church and meets Matt Champion, an expert in medieval graffiti who has found some incredible links to past villagers.

programme.title: Italy's Invisible Cities
programme.desc: Using the latest 3D scanning technology, Alexander Armstrong and Dr Michael Scott uncover 2,500 years of hidden history in Naples from its earliest Greek and Roman origins. They explore how the volcano of Mount Vesuvius both nurtured the region and exacted a terrible price on the local population. Plus, they delve into a labyrinth of fascinating underground spaces that helped build and sustain the city.

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: Paul Martin is joined by experts Kate Bateman and Adam Partridge as they explore the collectables at a valuation day in the spa town of Malvern. Adam gets in a spin over a wooden top that reminds him of his childhood, and Kate hopes she's struck gold with some coins that could be worth thousands. Paul takes a break from the antiques and tries his hand at some woodwork - meeting a local man who's been making violins for over 40 years.

programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games [NEW]
programme.desc: Former players Josh Jones, Sarah Keyworth, Melvin Odoom and Kimberly Wyatt test their general knowledge skills on this week's Richard Osman's House of Games: Redemption Week.

programme.title: Do You Know Your Place? [NEW]
programme.desc: Vernon Kay and unreliable tour guide Paul Gorton see if Nitin Ganatra, the Rev Kate Bottley and Gladiator Apollo can sort fact from fiction. Today's adventure takes them to Bristol.

programme.title: Great British Menu [NEW]
programme.desc: It's judging day, and only one chef can go through to represent Scotland. Bafta-winning actress Katherine Parkinson helps decide the winner from the two remaining chefs.

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: Ally and son Noah apply the salon treatment to go head-to-head with mainland breeders.

programme.title: Channel 4 News [NEW]
programme.desc: Channel 4's flagship news programme. With sport and weather.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil are off to Mapperley in Nottinghamshire where Sue and husband Richard agree that their beautiful home is no longer fit for purpose, but they can't agree on whether to stay put or move on.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: Delve into the inside story of the murder of a 74-year-old woman and the macabre lengths the killer went to in attempting to conceal her death. Annette Smith's lodger reports that she has been missing for several weeks.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: The suspect admits to the murder of a 74-year-old woman. But a deeply disturbing tale that shocks experienced detectives has only just begun. The police continue to probe the suspect and the interview becomes more and more chilling.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Andrew sustains a severe facial injury from a machine at work and is rushed to the medical centre. Tony is crushed by a forklift truck, and in Resus, 61-year-old John keeps having sudden blackouts.

programme.title: Super Surgeons: A Chance at Life
programme.desc: Ex-navy pilot Rich has a massive 16cm tumour running from his jaw to his heart. Meanwhile, nearly all the organs in Tracy's pelvis need removal to combat her stage four bowel cancer.

programme.title: The Dunblane Tapes
programme.desc: After the mass shooting at Dunblane Primary School in 1996 a grassroots campaign was launched to ban private handguns in Britain. The remarkable story is told using one bereaved parent's recently uncovered recordings.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The co-owners of South Brooklyn Foundry don't see eye-to-eye, causing communication to grow toxic while the restaurant falls into more debt; Gordon Ramsay steps in to reassess the Brooklyn eatery's priorities and straighten out the finances.

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours in...
programme.desc: Desiree Burch joins Joe Lycett in the city of Rovaniemi, the official home of Santa Claus, in Finnish Lapland on the edge of the Arctic Circle. They try ice fishing, ride in a traditional Sami reindeer caravan and look for the Northern lights.

programme.title: Our Welsh Chapel Dream
programme.desc: As Keith and Marj await the go-ahead to transform the chapel into a home, pottery studio and events space, they start ripping out the rot and pitch their plan to the local community.

programme.title: Kirstie's House of Craft
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp shows us how to create beautiful crafts with items we already own. She transforms some fabric by dyeing it with turmeric, and embellishes an old lampshade.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil catch up with two couples who had high expectations and long wish lists. Amy and Takie were desperate to get off the rental merry-go-round and buy their first home in London. Meanwhile, in Wiltshire Vicky and Andy were trying to combine their search for a home and two businesses on a budget of £400,000, which the couple eventually reconsidered once the reality of the market became clear.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Neil Delamere in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Woody has at last worked up the nerve to propose to Kelly. Alas, the golden moment is spoiled by the intervention of Kelly's French acquaintance Henri. With his visa about to expire, Henri sweet-talks Kelly into marrying him.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Rebecca is still not pregnant, and she suspects that Sam is infertile, making the self-confident womaniser's world come crashing down. Meanwhile, the Cranes are in hot water because Frasier won't make his will.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam and Rebecca rent a luxury hotel for a weekend. In romantic surroundings, they hope to conceive their long-awaited baby at last. However, there is no romance to be had because both of them are thinking about everyday life with a baby.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra takes offence when Marie accuses her of being rude and the two wind up fighting and not speaking to each other. Ray tries to sort it out and only makes a bad situation worse.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra and Ray's mother are refusing to talk to each other. Ray tries to take advantage of the situation and use it to help his aims. However, Robert resolves to change the problematic situation.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: When Debra accuses Ray of still not being able to pick up on her `not in the mood' signals, they fondly recall the first night they spent together.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Realising that everyone else has a companion, Frasier pursues a mysterious caller with a wrong number.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: In Mexico, Frasier falls for a stunning model and brings her back home. Unfortunately, he has trouble convincing his friends and family that she is real.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: As Martin's 65th birthday approaches, Frasier and Niles attempt to outdo each other with their gifts for their father.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: At a library benefit Halloween costume party, Frasier accidentally lets slip the news that Roz might be pregnant. Niles, who is getting drunk, misconstrues it to mean that Frasier has impregnated Daphne.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: A costume shop in upstate New York where owner Nicky and her husband have amassed an entire barn full of stuff. Later, Mike climbs over a wall of chairs to uncover a stash of Art Deco cigarette machines.

programme.desc: Channel 4's midday news summary.

programme.desc: Simon O'Brien and Max McMurdo head to leafy Woking, where their finds include a sidecar to be transformed into a boat, and a water cylinder that Simon thinks could be a trendy lamp.

programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Neil Delamere in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers.

programme.title: Four in a Bed [NEW]
programme.desc: The week's final hosts, Helen and Carl, have their work cut out to impress at their Nottinghamshire glampsite after ruffling feathers with their feedback all week.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me [NEW]
programme.desc: The fourth to host in South Wales is children's doctor Sophie, who despite usually being a vegan has decided to cook meat for her guests in an attempt to grab the grand. Sophie's night is full of surprises as she reveals a number of hidden talents.

programme.desc: Lucy Alexander is in Lower Normandy in France with Tracy and Lee from Greater Manchester, who run a dog walking business together. The couple have a budget of £70,000 to buy a holiday home that could one day become their permanent home.

programme.title: Channel 4 News [NEW]
programme.desc: Channel 4's flagship news programme. With sport and weather.

programme.title: Crufts 2026 [NEW]

programme.desc: Alice Roberts investigates how Barts came perilously close to collapse in the 1500s. She takes a look at a common Victorian treatment for the sick - bloodletting with leeches, and then follows the present day work of a world-renowned heart surgeon.

programme.desc: We follow consultant brain surgeon Omar Pathmanaban at Salford Royal Hospital as he tackles a rare tumour that could be fatal, and also a complex and demanding procedure requiring surgery via the nose.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Mulder battles a manipulator when the agents are assigned to a case involving a man seemingly capable of bending people to his will.

programme.desc: After collapsing at the wheel of his car, a stroke victim's brain is swelling and scans reveal a tumour which needs removing. Plus, a delicate spinal operator to alleviate lower back pain.

programme.desc: It is bedtime and Peppa calls Kylie Kangaroo and is surprised to learn that it is not morning or winter where she is! Daddy Pig explains this using a big ball to represent the Earth.

programme.title: Love Nature [NEW]
programme.desc: Fidra is a small island in the Firth of Forth near North Berwick, and is a significant nesting site for Atlantic puffins, hosting around a thousand breeding pairs, with conservation.

programme.title: The Motorway

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: The intrepid explorer Indiana Jones sets out to rescue his father, a medievalist who has vanished while searching for the Holy Grail. Following clues in the old man's notebook, Indy arrives in Venice, where he enlists the help of a beautiful academic, but they are not the only ones who are on the trail, and some sinister old enemies soon come out of the woodwork.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: Professor Henry Jones is given a coded message during the Cold War which leads him to Peru in search of a legendary skull. Jones needs to deliver the skull to its rightful place, but Soviet agents who are trailing Jones have other plans which will endanger the West if the artefact falls into their hands.

programme.title: Bad Boys: Ride or Die
programme.desc: When their late police captain gets linked to drug cartels, wisecracking Miami cops Mike Lowrey and Marcus Burnett embark on a dangerous mission to clear his name.

programme.title: The Fall Guy
programme.desc: Down-and-out stuntman Ryan Gosling sets out to find the missing star of his ex-girlfriend's blockbuster.

programme.title: Rampage
programme.desc: Primatologist Davis Okoye shares an unshakable bond with George, an extraordinarily intelligent silverback gorilla that's been in his care since birth. When a genetic experiment goes wrong, it causes George, a wolf and a reptile to grow to a monstrous size. As the mutated beasts embark on a path of destruction, Okoye teams up with a discredited genetic engineer and the military to secure an antidote and prevent a global catastrophe.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: Street-racing sequel following an adrenaline-junkie automobile addict who narrowly avoids jail by agreeing to move in with his father in Tokyo. However, he soon discovers the thrill of the local underground drift racing scene and unwittingly becomes involved with the Yakuza.

programme.title: Fast & Furious
programme.desc: Dominic Toretto is forced to come out of hiding when a loved one is brutally murdered. Heading to LA to track down the culprit, he crosses paths with Brian O'Connor, the FBI agent whose undercover infiltration of Toretto's gang led to the motorised miscreant's exile across the border. The two men temporarily put their differences aside as they investigate the killing.

programme.title: 300: Rise of an Empire
programme.desc: Xerxes, driven by vengeance for his father's death, leads an army against Greece. Greek city-states join forces under Athens' command to fight Artemisia in a naval battle.

programme.title: xXx: The Return of Xander Cage
programme.desc: After coming out of self-imposed exile, daredevil operative Xander Cage must race against time to recover a sinister weapon known as Pandora's Box, a device that controls every military satellite in the world. Recruiting a new group of thrill-seeking cohorts, Xander finds himself entangled in a deadly conspiracy that points to collusion at the highest levels of government.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 6
programme.desc: Since Dom and Brian's heist in Rio they must live as fugitives. Meanwhile, Agent Hobbs has been tracking a gang of lethally skilled mercenary drivers. Hobbs asks Dom and his crew for help in exchange for full pardons for everyone.

programme.title: Rampage
programme.desc: Primatologist Davis Okoye shares an unshakable bond with George, an extraordinarily intelligent silverback gorilla that's been in his care since birth. When a genetic experiment goes wrong, it causes George, a wolf and a reptile to grow to a monstrous size. As the mutated beasts embark on a path of destruction, Okoye teams up with a discredited genetic engineer and the military to secure an antidote and prevent a global catastrophe.

programme.title: Godzilla x Kong: The New Empire
programme.desc: Godzilla and the almighty Kong face a colossal threat hidden deep within the planet, challenging their very existence and the survival of the human race.

programme.title: Spider-Man
programme.desc: A shy student becomes a crime fighter after a bite from a mutant spider, during a school outing, gives him extraordinary powers. As he comes to terms with his new-found abilities, he is also forced to contend with a maniac villain known as the Green Goblin.

programme.title: Transformers One
programme.desc: Brothers-in-arms Orion Pax and D-16 become sworn enemies Optimus Prime and Megatron.

While enjoying the popularity at first, his tall tale starts to unravel as others begin to suspect that he is not the Defender of the Reef after all, and when the shark's enemies get involved, his lies lead him into dangerous waters.

programme.title: Deep Sea
programme.desc: Swept into the sea during a family cruise, a young girl named Shenxiu stumbles upon a mysterious restaurant under the waves. There, she meets the scheming head chef and his ragtag crew of adorable otters and sarcastic walruses.

programme.title: Batman Unlimited: Monster Mayhem
programme.desc: The Dark Knight assembles his heroic friends like Green Arrow and Nightwing to stop the Joker and his cronies from unleashing a diabolical computer virus.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go! & DC Super Hero Girls: Mayhem in the Multiverse
programme.desc: The Super Hero Girls and the Teen Titans reluctantly band together to fight a new threat to the universe.

programme.title: Buffalo Kids
programme.desc: Arriving in New York City in 1886, two orphaned Irish siblings embark on a wild cross-country journey aboard a transcontinental train. They make a new friend and encounter heroes and villains in their quest to find a new home.

programme.title: Straight Outta Nowhere: Scooby-Doo Meets Courage the Cowardly Dog
programme.desc: Scooby-Doo and the Gang find themselves in the middle of Nowhere, Kansas, the backwoods hometown of Courage and his owners, Muriel and Eustace Bagge.

programme.title: Fox and Hare Save the Forest
programme.desc: One day, Fox and Hare discover that Owl has disappeared. They go looking for him in the forest with all their friends and discover a big lake that wasn't there before. It is the beginning of an exciting and funny adventure.

programme.title: Monsters vs Aliens
programme.desc: When Susan Murphy is unexpectedly hit by a meteor full of outer space gunk, she mysteriously grows to over 49 feet tall. Captured by the military and labelled a monster named Ginormica, she is held in a secret government compound with a variety of other `monsters'. When an evil alien attacks the Earth, this motley crew of monsters is called into action to save the world from imminent destruction.

programme.title: Pil's Adventures
programme.desc: Pil, a little orphan, lives in the streets of the city of Roc-en-Brume. With her three tamed weasels, she survives by stealing food from the castle of the sinister regent who usurps the throne.

programme.title: Monster Family 2
programme.desc: Members of the Wishbone family transform into a vampire, a mummy, a werewolf and Frankenstein to save their monster friends from a mysterious hunter.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr., who's intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison and vows revenge against Gru.

programme.title: Turbo
programme.desc: Turbo, a lowly garden snail, get to live his racing dream when his DNA is supercharged with nitrous oxide. Backed by some unlikely sponsors and a crew of fast-talking street snails, Turbo finds himself lining up against his driving hero in the ultimate test of speed and endurance: the Indianapolis 500.

programme.title: The LEGO Movie 2: The Second Part
programme.desc: The citizens of Bricksburg face a dangerous new threat when LEGO DUPLO invaders from outer space start to wreck everything in their path. The battle to defeat the enemy and restore harmony to the LEGO universe takes Emmet, Lucy, Batman and the rest of their friends to faraway, unexplored worlds that test their courage and creativity.

programme.title: Rango
programme.desc: An ordinary chameleon, Rango, winds up in the town of Dirt, a lawless outpost in the Wild West in need of a new sheriff.

programme.title: The Cut
programme.desc: Given one last shot at glory, a former boxing champion has just six days to make weight for a title fight. His obsession soon leaves him at the mercy of a notorious trainer who takes every last ounce from his mind, body and soul.

programme.title: Empire of the Sun
programme.desc: Young Jim has to grow up fast after the Japanese invade Shanghai. Separated from his parents and alone in a prisoner of war camp, Jim must fight to survive.

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman
programme.desc: At a tough training school for American navy pilots, one of the new intake falls foul of the hard-as-nails drill sergeant, but takes it on the chin, and finds the additional strength to help a fellow student who is feeling the pressure.

programme.title: Two Mules for Sister Sara
programme.desc: A whimsical but engaging western about a drifter who saves a woman from a gang of marauders. The cowboy is astonished to learn that the woman is a nun, especially when he witnesses her heavy drinking and cigar-smoking ways. The unlikely pair embarks on a voyage of discovery as they become embroiled in the Mexican War.

programme.title: The Damned United
programme.desc: The story of Brian Clough's 44-day stint as manager of Leeds United Football Club, in 1974. When Don Revie quits Leeds to become the England boss, the outspoken Brian Clough takes charge. Determined to impose his own style upon Revie's tough tackling team, Clough soon alienates his players and the board. Based on the book by David Peace.

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: ‫Struggling artiste Ally has just about given up on her dream to make it big as a singer, until seasoned musician Jackson Maine discovers her and coaxes her into the spotlight. But as Ally's career takes off, Jack fights an ongoing battle with his own internal demons.‬

programme.title: Burning an Illusion
programme.desc: A young British-born black woman begins to question her attitude to love and life, and her desire for middle-class respectability and security through marriage.

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman
programme.desc: At a tough training school for American navy pilots, one of the new intake falls foul of the hard-as-nails drill sergeant, but takes it on the chin, and finds the additional strength to help a fellow student who is feeling the pressure.

programme.title: Empire of the Sun
programme.desc: Young Jim has to grow up fast after the Japanese invade Shanghai. Separated from his parents and alone in a prisoner of war camp, Jim must fight to survive.
